title: Sausage-Filled Mushrooms
ingredients: 1 package Philadelphia cream cheese, room temperature and cut into 8 pieces
1 package regular or spicy Jimmy Dean sausage roll
Freshly grated parmesan or asiago cheese
instructions: Clean mushrooms by dry brushing – do not submerge in water.
Create mushroom caps by removing stem and fibers.
Saute sausage, broken into small pieces, until almost cooked through.
Stir in cream cheese until well combined.
Fill mushroom caps with sausage mixture and bake for 20-25 minutes.
Remove from oven and immediately sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Place on platter and garnish with parsley.
notes: This recipe was a huge crowd pleaser in the 1990s.
